name: aramid-bridge.get_supported_assets
description: List assets supported by the Aramid Bridge with available routes between Voi and Algorand

chain.description: Filter by source chain, or omit to show all routes

symbol.description: Filter by token symbol (e.g. VOI, USDC, ETH)

response.description: Bridgeable assets with source/destination token IDs and route information

name: aramid-bridge.bridge_txn
description: Build unsigned bridge transaction for transferring assets between Voi and Algorand via the Aramid Bridge

symbol.description: Token symbol to bridge (e.g. VOI, ALGO, USDC, ETH, UNIT, POW)

amount.description: Amount in human-readable units (e.g. '10' for 10 VOI)

sender.description: Sender wallet address on source chain

destinationAddress.description: Recipient wallet address on destination chain

response.description: Base64-encoded unsigned transactions for signing via UluWalletMCP
